title: DatabasePolicyConfig
description: Policy config for database service connectors (snowflake, postgres, etc.).

principalType.description: Type of principal the grant is issued to.

principal.description: Grantee identifier. For USER this is typically the email/username; for ROLE the role name.

databaseName.description: Database on which the grant is applied.

schemaName.description: Schema on which the grant is applied. If omitted, the grant is scoped to the database.

tableName.description: Table on which the grant is applied. Requires schemaName.

columnName.description: Column on which the grant is applied. Requires tableName. Supported only by connectors that allow column-level grants; ignored otherwise.
